name: PATRICK INDUSTRIES INC. Registe
summary: Patrick Industries, Inc. is a manufacturer of component products and distributor of building products and materials for the recreational vehicle (RV), manufactured housing (MH) and industrial markets. Based in Elkhart, Indiana, the company operates manufacturing facilities and distribution centers across North America. Their products include decorative vinyl, fabricated aluminum, fiberglass, electrical systems, plumbing products, and furniture.
